rewrites.comment: Serve the static native-auth bridge page (out/native-auth.html). Without this, the catch-all below rewrites /native-auth to the game's index.html — the static export emits native-auth.html, not native-auth/index.html, and there's no cleanUrls.
Same: serve the static download/landing page instead of the SPA catch-all.

headers.comment: Default: never cache (covers the SPA routes that serve index.html via the rewrite, e.g. '/'). A stale index.html points at old JS chunks → the rules-not-applying bug.
Hashed build assets are immutable — safe to cache forever. Listed LAST so it overrides the catch-all for these paths (Firebase: last match wins).
Mirrored Pokémon sprites — a given dex's sprite never changes, so cache forever (overrides the no-cache catch-all). This replaced flaky raw.githubusercontent.com loads.
Mirrored Pokémon cries (audio) — content-stable, cache forever. Replaced flaky raw.githubusercontent.com loads.
